code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut seen = "\n"
mut count = 0
mut token = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b <= 32
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      let key = "\n#{token}\n"
      if not string.contains(seen, key)
        seen = "#{seen}#{token}\n"
        count = count + 1
      end
      token = ""
    end
  else
    token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not string.is_empty(token)
  let key = "\n#{token}\n"
  if not string.contains(seen, key)
    count = count + 1
  end
end
println("unique=#{count}")
